title: Beacons Revisioned
body: ----- Beacons are quite underpowered considering how much effort it takes to get one, this mod aims to fix that by adding new Upgrades to Beacons! You can now craft 6 new Upgrades that you can apply to a Beacon for new effects and abilities. ---- ****The Different Beacon Upgrades**** **Flight Upgrade** (Supports Tiers) - When placed on top of a Beacon. - Grants all players in a 15-block radius the ability to fly like in creative mode. **Fire Resistance Upgrade** (Supports Tiers) - When placed on top of a Beacon. - Provides players within 15 blocks Fire Resistance, in addition to the Beacon's existing effects. **Slow Falling Upgrade** (Supports Tiers) - When placed on top of a Beacon. - Gives nearby players Slow Falling and the selected beacon effects within a 15-block radius. **Mob Identifier Upgrade** - When placed on top of a Beacon and right-clicked. - Opens a GUI allowing users to highlight a specific mob type with a glow effect in a 32-block radius from the beacon. **Reversed Beacon:** - When placed on top of a Beacon and right-clicked. - Opens a GUI where you can choose a set of negative effects to apply to, Mobs (Passive or Hostile) or Players. **Weather Upgrade:** - When Placed on top of a Beacon and right-clicked. - Opens a GUI where you can choose the weather type.
